name: SigurdAideenTalk
commands: Lord Sigurd! So you came to my aid, did you?{w}{br}Please accept my apologies. I've put the people{br}of Chalphy through nothing but danger...{w}
Don't worry about it.{br}Everyone will be glad to know that you're safe.{w}{br}You've nothing to worry about anymore.{w}{br}The road back to Jungby is secure for you, when you're ready.{w}
No, I wish to remain here.{br}Injuries are inevitable in war.{w}{br}As a humble servant to the gods, it is my duty{br}to stay here and aid your wounded.{w}

Say, Aideen... As I recall, you declined to pursue{br}a knighthood and instead joined the clergy. Am I right?{w}I shouldn't be surprised, knowing how easily{br}people warm to you, and you them.{w}{br}I'd do well to learn from your example!{w}
Thank you, Lord Sigurd, but that isn't entirely true{w}{br}Initially, I sought priesthood in a bid to help me{br}find my sister.{w}{br}Even now, I still believe this is the answer I seek.{w}
You mean Bridget...{br}I'd heard that she went missing as a child.{w}{br}So all this time, Aideen, you've been{br}praying for her sake, haven't you?{w}
Yes. I know we'll meet someday.{w}{br}No matter what happens, I mush give her this:{br}her sacred birthright, the bow Yewfelle!{w}
